sql.query: SELECT c.id,c.contactCategoryId,COALESCE(cc.categoryName,c.contactType) AS contactType,c.organisationName,c.firstName,c.lastName,c.displayName,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ',c.firstName,c.lastName)),''),NULLIF(c.displayName,''),NULLIF(c.organisationName,''),'Unnamed contact') AS contactName,c.email,c.phone,c.addressLine1,c.addressLine2,c.city,c.region,c.postcode,c.country,c.notes,c.isActive FROM tbl_contacts c LEFT JOIN tbl_contact_categories cc ON cc.contactCategoryId=c.contactCategoryId AND cc.tenantId=c.tenantId WHERE c.id=:id AND c.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
